title: Data Localisation — Cybersecurity Law
description: Important data about Vietnamese citizens (including personal data, data about relationships, and data generated by users) must be stored on servers physically located in Vietnam. Cross-border transfer of such data is restricted and subject to regulatory approval.
trigger: Storing or processing Vietnamese user data

title: Investment Registration Certificate
description: Foreign investors establishing a business presence in Vietnam must obtain an Investment Registration Certificate (IRC) from the Department of Planning and Investment. The IRC defines permitted business sectors, investment capital, and operational scope.
trigger: Establishing a legal presence in Vietnam

title: Representative Office Registration
description: Foreign companies operating a representative office in Vietnam must register with the provincial Department of Industry and Trade. Representative offices may not conduct profit-generating commercial activities directly.

title: Personal Income Tax (PIT) Registration
description: Employers must register for personal income tax withholding with the local Tax Department before paying salaries to Vietnamese employees. Monthly withholding and quarterly finalisation filings are required.

title: Social Insurance Registration
description: Employers with employees under Vietnamese labour contracts must register for and contribute to compulsory social insurance, health insurance, and unemployment insurance. Employer contributions total approximately 21.5% of monthly salary.
trigger: First employee with Vietnamese labour contract

title: Work Permit for Foreign Employees
description: Foreign nationals working in Vietnam must obtain a work permit from the Department of Labour, Invalids and Social Affairs (DOLISA), unless they qualify for an exemption. Work permits are valid for up to 2 years and tied to the specific employer and position.
trigger: Deploying foreign national to work in Vietnam
